title: Project Manager — CCGT Power Station (Mechanical, Contract)
description_raw:
Mitsubishi Power are recruiting a Project Manager to oversee the mechanical construction and commissioning phase of a new 800MW CCGT (Combined Cycle Gas Turbine) power station in Lincolnshire. Engagement is outside IR35 via your own limited company.

The project is a landmark combined cycle development with a target commercial operation date of Q4 2027. The PM will hold overall responsibility for the mechanical installation and commissioning workstream on this EPC contract.

Key responsibilities:
- Own the mechanical installation programme for gas turbine, steam turbine, heat recovery steam generator (HRSG) and balance of plant systems
- Administer NEC4 contracts with the mechanical installation subcontractor
- Lead daily site meetings and report schedule performance (CPI/SPI) to the Project Director
- Manage handover from construction to commissioning using ITR records
- Interface with the grid connection team on substation readiness

Profile:
- BEng Mechanical Engineering minimum
- Experience on CCGT, combined cycle, or large gas turbine power projects essential
- Knowledge of p&id review and hazop participation desirable

Rate: £600/day outside IR35
Duration: 18 months
Start: ASAP
Location: Lincolnshire — site-based
